hero.intro: Soft, film-like, natural everyday portraits — captured as Nanjing memories you'll want to revisit. Perfect for first-timers, couple anniversaries, and relaxed city walks.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.intro: Real client photos organized by style — click to view full size
gallery.description: Park shoots, Jiangnan vibes, street style, indoor portraits and couple sessions are filtered separately. Only authorized real client works are shown here.
gallery.discoveryTitle: Choose a mood first, then open the full story
gallery.discoveryHint: Search by title, place, or style, or switch to compact browsing.
gallery.emptyTitle: No photos match this combination yet
gallery.emptyDesc: Try another keyword, or clear the filters to keep browsing all authorized work.
gallery.searchEmpty: No photos match your search. Try a different keyword.

polaroid.title: Polaroid Album
polaroid.hintExpanded: Click photo to flip · Click backdrop to close
polaroid.backNote: Every shutter click is a gentle light.

cards.title: Every Photo
cards.text: It's more than pressing the shutter. From the moment we meet, we're writing a visual narrative together.

cards.title: Light & Shadow
cards.text: Natural light is the best brush. Under Nanjing's plane trees and old street corners, light and shadow tell their own stories.

cards.title: Beyond Beauty
cards.text: We don't shoot perfection — we shoot truth. Your first date nerves, graduation reluctance, and the freedom of city wandering.

photoMap.title: Coverage Map
photoMap.intro: Centered at JinShen College in Xianlin University Town

cards.freeText: Xianlin University Town and JinShen College area — walking or e-bike distance, no travel fee.
cards.feeText: Beyond free zone but within 10km range — actual travel costs reimbursed (taxi or metro).
cards.unreachableText: Outside daily shooting range — temporarily unable to serve. Sorry for the inconvenience.

midCTA.title: Turn Your Day Into Poetry
midCTA.desc: Alone, as a couple, or with your best friend — every shutter release captures your Nanjing story.

reasons.title: Soft Film Look
reasons.text: We favor soft misty light and low-saturation tones — no harsh flash, just peaceful, comfortable results.

reasons.title: Full Posing Guidance
reasons.text: No experience needed. From stance to eye direction, every detail is gently guided. Just relax and be yourself.

reasons.title: Privacy First
reasons.text: No photos are shared by default. Every displayed image is individually authorized by the client.

reasons.title: Nanjing Local
reasons.text: Deep knowledge of Nanjing's best photo spots — Xianlin, Xuanwu Lake, Yihe Road, Purple Mountain and beyond.

fitScene.indoor: Best for: indoor studio, cafes, light themes, weather-independent shoots.
fitScene.outdoor: Best for: Nanjing parks, streets, Jiangnan-style routes, natural light.
fitScene.instant: Best for: a physical keepsake on shoot day, an instant memento.

fitPeople.indoor: Great for: first-timers, those who want a quiet environment and consistent lighting.
fitPeople.outdoor: Great for: natural interactions, couple anniversaries, relaxed candid vibes.
fitPeople.instant: Great for: those who love ritual, film-like trinkets, and physical photos.

outfit.title: Styling & Outfit
outfit.desc: Each session includes basic styling and one outfit recommendation. Extra looks can be arranged.

retouching.title: Retouched Photos
retouching.desc: All digital negatives included. Retouched count per package. Additional retouching available.

timing.title: Session Length
timing.desc: Timed from meet-up, includes styling and transit. Overtime billed per hour.

delivery.title: Delivery Time
delivery.desc: Retouched photos within 7 business days. All negatives via cloud link within 3 days.

deposit.title: Deposit Locks Date
deposit.text: A deposit secures your booking. Balance is due on the shoot day.

reschedule.title: Free Reschedule
reschedule.text: One free reschedule 48h before the shoot. Deposit forfeited after that.

weather.title: Weather Guarantee
weather.text: Free reschedule in case of bad weather — doesn't count toward your reschedule limit.

copyright.title: Copyright
copyright.text: Copyright belongs to the photographer. Clients have permanent usage rights.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.text: Contact me via Xiaohongshu or WeChat — tell me your preferred style and ideas.

steps.title: Book & Deposit
steps.text: Confirm the date, location and package. Pay a deposit to lock your slot.

steps.title: Shoot Day
steps.text: Arrive at the location. Full posing guidance throughout. Relax and enjoy!

steps.title: Select & Retouch
steps.text: Receive a gallery link within 2 days. Pick your favorites for retouching.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.text: Final retouched photos delivered via cloud. Your smile is the best feedback.

faq.safetyText: Your safety and comfort are our priority. All shoots take place in public or pre-agreed locations. For indoor shoots, venue details and safety are confirmed beforehand. You're welcome to bring a friend — just let me know!

questions.q: I've never done this before. What if I don't know how to pose?
questions.a: No worries at all. 80% of our clients are first-timers. I'll guide you through every pose, angle and expression — you just relax and be yourself.
Absolutely! Bringing a friend makes the atmosphere more relaxed. They can also help with your belongings. For couple or bestie shoots, choose the corresponding package.

questions.q: How do we pick a location?
questions.a: I'll recommend locations based on your preferred style. Nanjing has plenty of great spots — parks, old streets, campuses, cafes... or we can go somewhere special to you.

questions.q: Will my photos be shared publicly?
questions.a: No, never by default. Every photo displayed here is individually authorized by the client. Only you decide if your photos are shared.

questions.q: What if the weather is bad?
questions.a: Free reschedule for bad weather — doesn't count toward your limit. Actually, overcast days are great for photos — soft, even light makes skin look even better.
Each retouched photo includes one free revision to meet reasonable adjustment requests.

items.text: The photos felt so natural. Even if you don't know how to pose, she guides you the whole time and is incredibly patient.
items.author: Xiaohongshu user @Little Orange

items.text: This was my second session. Every time exceeded expectations, and the warm film tone is exactly what I wanted.
items.author: Xiaohongshu user @A Ning

items.text: I found such a good photographer in Nanjing. Communication, shooting, and delivery all felt smooth, and the price is fair.
items.author: Xiaohongshu user @Mia

items.text: I was nervous for my first portrait session, but the whole shoot felt relaxed and conversational. The final photos were such a happy surprise.
items.author: Xiaohongshu user @Xixi

items.text: A lovely choice for couple photos. Neither of us knew how to pose, but the guidance made the photos feel natural and full of warmth.
items.author: Xiaohongshu user @Chen and partner

quiz.step1.title: What's the occasion?
quiz.step2.title: What style do you like?
quiz.step3.title: Which season?
quiz.step4.title: How many people?
quiz.result.title: Recommended Package
quiz.result.desc: Based on your choices, we recommend the following
quiz.recommendations.couple: A couple session works best in natural light, walking through a park or quiet street while capturing relaxed moments together.
quiz.recommendations.family: Family portraits feel warmer outdoors, where everyone can interact naturally in an easy setting.
quiz.recommendations.group: Friends sessions are easier and more joyful outdoors, with room to move, laugh, and interact.
quiz.recommendations.studio: Creative or urban fashion styles are better indoors, where light and scene control are more precise.
quiz.recommendations.birthday: A birthday session works well indoors with a focused setup and less weather uncertainty.
quiz.recommendations.weather: A comfortable indoor space keeps the shoot easy in very hot or cold weather, while still supporting vintage or natural looks.
quiz.recommendations.spring: Springtime Nanjing outdoors is a natural studio, perfect for fresh or soft film-like portraits.
quiz.recommendations.autumn: Autumn Nanjing outdoors is a natural studio, perfect for warm, fresh or soft film-like portraits.

seo.homeDesc: Soft, film-like portrait photography in Nanjing. Natural everyday portraits for individuals and couples — Xianlin, Xuanwu Lake, Yihe Road and beyond.
seo.galleryDesc: Browse our portfolio of Nanjing portrait photography — park shoots, Jiangnan vibes, street style, indoor portraits and couple sessions.
seo.coursesDesc: Learn portrait photography from basics to advanced — systematic courses covering posing, lighting, and post-processing.
seo.presetsDesc: Professional color grading presets for instant download — Lightroom, Photoshop, and more.
seo.workshopsDesc: Join offline photography workshops and experiences — hands-on shooting, guided by professional photographers.
seo.shopDesc: Custom photo albums, postcards, frames and prints — turn your beautiful memories into physical products.
seo.bookingDesc: Book your Nanjing portrait photography session — choose from indoor, outdoor, or instant camera packages.
seo.courseDetailDesc: Learn about this photography course — modules, syllabus, and preview.
seo.presetDetailDesc: Download this professional Lightroom preset — preview, reviews, and compatibility info.
seo.workshopDetailDesc: Workshop details — schedule, location, registration, and what to bring.
seo.shopDetailDesc: Product details — specifications, ordering guide, and related items.
seo.mapDesc: View our portrait photography service area across Nanjing — parks, streets, and scenic locations.
seo.photoDetailDesc: View this portrait photo — details, related photos, and book a similar session.

editor.title: Portrait Studio
editor.desc: Upload portrait photos and use AI face detection for professional beauty retouching including skin smoothing, face slimming, eye enlargement, nose slimming, lip enhancement, and more.
editor.subtitle: Upload a portrait to start beautifying
editor.dropHint: or drag and drop an image
editor.degradedMode: The network or model files are temporarily unavailable. Filters, text, frames and export still work; face retouching will resume after the models load.
editor.noFaceDetected: No clear face was detected. Color, filters, text and export still work; try a clearer front-facing portrait for beauty or reshape tools.

catDesc.reshape: Face slimming, eye enlargement, nose, lips, jawline
catDesc.filter: One-click preset filters for instant effects
catDesc.tools: Background blur/remove, local adjustments, double exposure
catDesc.bg: Blur, remove, or replace the background

workflow.label: Editor workflow
workflow.quickDesc: Start with portrait-ready retouching for fast results.
workflow.colorDesc: Tune warmth, brightness, contrast, and one-tap filters together.
workflow.composeDesc: Add text, stickers, frames, backgrounds, and local effects.
workflow.exportDesc: Review comparison and choose social or print-ready output quality.

editor.exportSummaryDesc: Confirm comparison, format, and quality before download. If export fails, you can retry here.

exportStatus.failed: Export failed. Lower quality or try again.
